title: Come join the fastest growing platform JumpTD
author: Consistent_Mail_9403
selftext:
Jump Tradiny is the newest version of quantitative trading, months newer than COS and is the highest growing platform out there with a $200 sign up bonus and fantastic user benefits.

[https://jumptdd.com/#/register?code=APNIST](https://jumptdd.com/#/register?code=APNIST)

Simply deposit over $50 (around £45) and you will be untitled to unlock VIP LEVEL 1 and get 4 quantitative trades per day

You will be invited to our Whatsapp help group with admins on hand 24/7 to answer any question and video tutorials explaining everything. 

If you need any help just give me a DM, happy to help!
